feed.title: Kailash A. Hambarde
feed.subtitle: I am a Researcher at [Instituto de Telecomunicações (IT)](https://www.it.pt/Members/Index/40083) and Faculty (Docente) at the [Department of Computer Science, University of Beira Interior (UBI)](https://www.ubi.pt/en/). My research is in the **Pattern and Image Analysis** group within the **Information and Data Sciences** thematic line. I work on computer vision, biometric recognition, person re-identification, and deep learning. Previously, I was a Postdoctoral Researcher at UBI, Senior Data Scientist at [Calance](https://www.calanceus.com/), Data Scientist at [NDS InfoServ](https://www.nds.co.in/), and Ph.D. scholar at [SRTM University](https://srtmun.ac.in/en/), India.
